title: Log4Shell — Apache Log4j2 JNDI RCE
description: Apache Log4j2 <=2.14.1 JNDI lookups allow unauthenticated RCE via crafted log messages.

title: Apache Struts2 Content-Type RCE
description: Apache Struts 2 Jakarta Multipart parser allows RCE via malformed Content-Type header.

title: Heartbleed — OpenSSL Memory Disclosure
description: OpenSSL 1.0.1 through 1.0.1f allows remote attackers to read process memory via heartbeat extension.

title: WordPress SQL Injection via WP_Query
description: WordPress 3.7–5.8.3 is vulnerable to SQL injection via WP_Query in certain plugin/theme contexts.

title: PHP-FPM Remote Code Execution (nginx env_path_info)
description: PHP-FPM in certain nginx configurations allows remote attackers to execute code via crafted URL.
